Implements complex animations for a Pebble app, with metadata and build script for multiple platforms.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Implements complex animations for a Pebble app with custom handlers and text layer movements.

## Files
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the ComplexAnimations app, including UUID, version, and target platforms.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling Pebble projects with support for multiple platforms and optional worker binaries.
